name: golang-github-google-subcommands-dev
title: golang-github-google-subcommands-dev
summary: go package for add some subcommands to single command
description:
go package for add some subcommands to single command
Subcommands is a Go package that implements a simple way for a single command
to have many subcommands, each of which takes arguments and so forth.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-google-subcommands-dev because go package for add some subcommands to single command.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-google-subcommands-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-google-subcommands-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-google-subcommands-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
